design_philosophy: A welcoming, trustworthy, and organized platform for church management. Uses warm, earthy tones to evoke community and peace, replacing cold SaaS clinical vibes with organic warmth.

scales.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tight leading-none text-text-primary

layout_spacing.philosophy: Generous Spacing Philosophy. Use 2-3x more spacing than typical designs to give content breathing room.
layout_spacing.surfaces: Flat Solid backgrounds with subtle 1px borders (border-border). Avoid soft UI everywhere.

components.buttons: Rounded-md (max 8px). Pure primary color for main CTA. Explicitly set hover states (hover:bg-primary_hover hover:text-white). No default shadows.
components.cards: Flat surface (#FFFFFF), 1px subtle border (#E5E3DC), sharp or subtly rounded (max 8px). Hover state: slight lift (-translate-y-1) and subtle shadow (shadow-lg).
components.navigation: Marketing: Sticky header with Crystal Glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80 border-b border-border/40). Dashboard: Solid off-white sidebar. Mobile Participant: Bottom fixed navigation for easy thumb reach.
components.drag_and_drop_liturgy: Use distinct grab handles (lucide icons). High contrast drop zones with dashed borders in secondary color. Dragging item should get a shadow-xl and scale up slightly.
components.live_service_timeline: Full-screen distraction-free view. Enormous text. Current active stage highlighted with secondary color (Sage) background and bold text. Negative space is critical here.
components.charts: Recharts. Avoid default colors. Map series to brand palette: #E07A5F, #81B29A, #F2CC8F.
components.forms: Shadcn Input/Select components. Use flat borders, focus states must use primary color ring (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#E07A5F]).
components.tables: Clean, spacious rows (py-4). Left-aligned content. Avatar+Name flex combos for member columns.

animations.page_transitions: framer-motion subtle fade-in and slide-up (y: 20 -> y: 0)

images.description: Modern church building with a cross. Use with bg-black/40 overlay if text is on top, or position side-by-side.
A diverse group of people holding hands in prayer. Ideal for 'About Us' or feature sections.
Large congregation attending a conference. Good for event management placeholder.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure 4.5:1 ratio for text. Text over images must have overlays.
accessibility_and_testing.data_testid: MANDATORY: All interactive elements must include data-testid attributes in kebab-case (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-button', data-testid='liturgy-add-stage').

instructions_to_main_agent: You are building a hybrid fullstack app: A Marketing Landing Page, a SaaS Admin Dashboard, and a Mobile-First Participant Area.
Add 'Outfit' and 'Figtree' fonts to the project (e.g., via Google Fonts in index.html).
Setup Tailwind config extending colors with the custom palette provided.
Initialize React Router for navigating between / (landing), /admin (dashboard), and /app (mobile participant area).
Use dnd-kit for the Liturgy drag-and-drop editor.
For the 'Culto ao Vivo' mode, build a dedicated view without standard navigation, focusing purely on the timeline.
For the Participant Area (/app), use a mobile-first design pattern, max-width layout on desktop, and bottom tab navigation.
Do NOT use standard blue/purple SaaS colors. Stick strictly to the Organic & Earthy palette (Terracotta/Sage/Bone-white).
